arts.ttl: Real Madrid news: Kylian Mbappe accused of letting club ‘DIE’
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe might have won over Real Madrid ’s supporters, but the France international continues to face criticism in France for allowing Ligue 2 side Caen “to die”. “The club is going to die, it’s too late,” Jerome Rothen, a former PSG and Caen player, explained to RMC.
